summary: Excellent soundboard transfer capturing an on‑fire second set highlighted by a blistering Scarlet > Fire and soaring Eyes of the World.
review: The recording is praised as a crisp, off‑the‑charts CM transfer that sounds crystal clear. Musically the show is described as a groove‑monster with a second set that “is on fire,” featuring standout renditions of Scarlet > Fire, Eyes of the World, Me and My Uncle, and a rousing CC Rider.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 5‑star, uniformly praising both the performance (especially the second set) and the audio transfer; thus the combined show + recording rating is near top‑tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the CM transfer "crisp" and "off the charts," noting no audible flaws or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong first set builds into a second‑set firestorm; the transition from Scarlet > Fire is highlighted as tantalizing, though some note the show ended a bit underwhelmingly.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Possible Phil/Jerry instrument swap noted; praised as part of the tight groove.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned in context of the possible switch and overall band cohesion.
band_member_comments.Bob: Weir fans will be delighted; his work on Me and My Uncle is specifically called out.
